tests.name: t1
tests.prompt: Jag har en stor idé: dynamisk few-shot från Davids bekräftade leads. Bryt ner i issues.
assertions: Breaks the idea down into small, independent issues
Each issue has a clear title and description
Mentions acceptance criteria for the issues
Mentions creating the issues via GitHub (gh CLI or MCP)

tests.name: t2
tests.prompt: Hur stor ska en issue vara?
assertions: Recommends one issue equals one thing or one concern
